CIPHER.1414.cipherString: Please stop reassuring me of how respectful you are whenever you're about to tell me that I'm an idiot.
CIPHER.1414.question: A quote from the book Ender's Shadow has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher for you to decode. What does it say?

CIPHER.1415.cipherString: An educated person is she or he who knows where or how to acquire knowledge.
CIPHER.1415.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Checkerboard puzzle by Joseph Rain with a polybius key of PREREQUISITES. What does it say?
CIPHER.1415.author: Joseph Rain

CIPHER.1418.cipherString: The music industry has basically become an indie artist's dream.
CIPHER.1418.question: You found the following Nihilist Substitution code written in sharpie on an old vinyl record. It's a quote by Adam Mardel with a keyword of ALBUM and polybius key of SECOND ALIBI. What does it say?
CIPHER.1418.author: Adam Mardel

CIPHER.1417.cipherString: since torches do not work underwater, bring some glowsticks or a flare gun.
CIPHER.1417.question: This quote from a video game's wiki has been encoded as a Complete Columnar cipher. The quote has NOT WORK somewhere in it. What does it say?

CIPHER.1436.cipherString: The hotel shop only had two decent books, and I'd written both of them.
CIPHER.1436.question: Douglas Adams offers an observation that has been encoded as a Porta using a keyword of GUIDE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1436.author: Douglas Adams

CIPHER.1416.cipherString: Do not lie to the Scholar.
CIPHER.1416.question: You uncover this encoded note tucked behind a microscope slide. It's a quote by Philip Pullman, written in a Hill with a keyword of FACT. What does it say?
CIPHER.1416.author: Philip Pullman

CIPHER.1419.cipherString: Card Balancing involves weighing the use rates of “bread and butter” versus “spicy cards.”
CIPHER.1419.question: This Complete Columnar cipher contains a quote from the designer of a very popular game on the App Store. You are told it contains the word WEIGHING. What does it say?

CIPHER.1420.cipherString: Life exists in the universe only because the carbon atom possesses certain exceptional properties.
CIPHER.1420.question: The message below was encoded into the DNA sequence of a synthetic organism. It translates to a quote by James Jeans, encrypted using an Aristocrat Cipher with a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.1420.author: James Jeans

CIPHER.1421.cipherString: Keep your face to the sunshine and you cannot see the shadows.
CIPHER.1421.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by Helen Keller, encoded using a Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote has SHADO in it corresponding to the encoded text D B R S N E W O, meaning B = ●●●; D = ●××; E = –●●; N = ●–×; O = –×●; R = ×●●; S = ●●×; W = ×––. What does it say?
CIPHER.1421.author: Helen Keller

CIPHER.1422.cipherString: I drink a cup of sunlight every morning to brighten myself.
CIPHER.1422.question: Scrawled in dry-erase marker on the whiteboard after hours: this Nihilist Substitution encoded quote by Debasish Mridha, M.D with a keyword of LATTE and polybius key of REQUIREMENTS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1422.author: Debasish Mridha, M.D

CIPHER.1423.cipherString: At the age of fourteen I had experienced a miracle. I turned on a tap, and clean water came gushing out.
CIPHER.1423.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Suketu Mehta, written in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet (hint: the quote contains a number). What was the K1 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.1423.author: Suketu Mehta

CIPHER.1424.cipherString: Peace of mind for five minutes, that's what I crave.
CIPHER.1424.question: Astronomers notice this repeating sequence in deep-space data. It's actually a quote by Alanis Morissette, encoded with a Fractionated Morse, that sounds like something a parent of young children might say. You are told that the quote has VE MIN in it corresponding to the encoded text S N D M A H, meaning A = ●●×; D = ●××; H = –●×; M = ––×; N = ●–×; S = ×●●. What does it say?
CIPHER.1424.author: Alanis Morissette

CIPHER.1425.cipherString: Who is the happier man, he who has braved the storm of life and lived, or he who has stayed securely on shore and merely existed?
CIPHER.1425.question: You found the following question about risk-taking carved into the bark of a hollow log. You are told that it's a quote by Hunter S. Thompson encoded as a Patristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher begins with WHO IS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1425.author: Hunter S. Thompson

CIPHER.1426.question: This passage is apparently from League of Legends. It has been encoded as a Hill cipher with a keyword of BUFF for you to decrypt.
CIPHER.1426.author: League of Legends

CIPHER.1427.cipherString: Hollywood's a great place to live... if you're a grapefruit.
CIPHER.1427.question: A message flashes briefly on a malfunctioning computer screen. It turns out to be a quote by Rod Serling written in a Baconian cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1427.author: Rod Serling

CIPHER.1428.cipherString: Home, nowadays, is a place where part of the family waits till the rest of the family brings the car back.
CIPHER.1428.question: A famous phrase by Earl Wilson has been encoded as an Aristocrat cipher using a K2 alphabet. The cipher contains the word OF twice. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.1428.author: Earl Wilson

CIPHER.1429.cipherString: I don't remember what we talked about in the kitchen.
CIPHER.1429.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Baconian encoded quote. What does it say?

CIPHER.1430.cipherString: To open the window and let a wasp out of the room. Ah, is this not happiness?
CIPHER.1430.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Checkerboard quote by Jin Shengtan with a polybius key of ARTHROPODA. What does it say?
CIPHER.1430.author: Jin Shengtan

CIPHER.1431.cipherString: Sometimes, painful circumstances will find their way into your life. Be prepared for them and find ways to overcome them!
CIPHER.1431.question: The following K1 Patristocrat is generic but true advice by Gift Gugu Mona. You are told that the quote begins with a single 9-letter word that sometimes appears in these kinds of quotes. What advice does she give?
CIPHER.1431.author: Gift Gugu Mona

CIPHER.1432.question: Your Bunsen burner's flame suddenly spelled this Cryptarithm message. What do the values 3976615703 18564 decode to?

CIPHER.1433.cipherString: Encerrado entre esas cuatro paredes, imagina un viaje fantastico al país de los monstruos, donde se convertirá en el rey.
CIPHER.1433.question: This is a Spanish-language summary of the famous children's book Where the Wild Things Are. It has been encoded as a K2 Xenocrypt for you to solve.

CIPHER.1434.cipherString: We all like stories that make us cry. It's so nice to feel sad when you've nothing in particular to feel sad about.
CIPHER.1434.question: You discover a scrap of paper tucked inside a borrowed library book. It contains a quote by Anne Sullivan encoded as an Aristocrat using a K3 alphabet. What was the K3 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.1434.author: Anne Sullivan

CIPHER.1435.cipherString: You fail to understand, my friend. We do not control time. If anything, it controls us. We simply measure it.
CIPHER.1435.question: Projected by a broken laser pointer during physics class, solve this Aristocrat quote that one of sci-fi writer Michael Moorcock's characters said to another. You are told that the quote does not contain the word THE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1435.author: Michael Moorcock

CIPHER.1437.cipherString: Somebody who is resilient and is not afraid to work with a stranger and put your heart and soul into something and have it not just be about you
CIPHER.1437.question: The following quote by Science Olympiad CEO Jenny Kopach describing SciOly students is encrypted as an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1437.author: Jenny Kopach

CIPHER.1438.question: A vending machine just dispensed a drink that has this Cryptarithm code printed on the cup. It turns out to be their slogan! What do the values 586 345614758067 97625043 decode to?

CIPHER.1439.cipherString: I am not a great cook, I am not a great artist, but I love art, and I love food, so I am the perfect traveller.
CIPHER.1439.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Michael Palin, written in an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1439.author: Michael Palin

CIPHER.1440.cipherString: A community is like a ship; everyone ought to be prepared to take the helm.
CIPHER.1440.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Henrik Ibsen encoded as a Porta using a keyword of HELPER. What does it say?
CIPHER.1440.author: Henrik Ibsen

CIPHER.1441.cipherString: If you run after two hares, you will catch neither.
CIPHER.1441.question: Each day the digital clock flashes a proverb for exactly ten seconds using a Baconian cipher.  You are told that the cipher text SHOWN AS SHE ASKED LEAVE KNIFE decodes to be ESYOU. What does it say?
CIPHER.1441.author: Proverb

CIPHER.1442.cipherString: La oruga muy hambrienta es un libro lleno de colorido que habla de cómo una oruga se transforma en una linda mariposa.
CIPHER.1442.question: This is a Spanish-language description of one of the most famous books ever written for young children. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to decode.
